input_text: Nak guna tandas awam pun kena bayar tapi takde sabun, takde tissue. Bayar untuk apa sebenarnya?
reason: Paid public toilet lacking basic amenities, value-for-money complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Tandas awam berbayar perlu memenuhi standard kebersihan minimum. Laporkan kemudahan yang tidak memuaskan kepada PBT.

input_text: These contractors build drain so small. Every rain also flood. Obviously poor planning but nobody held accountable.
reason: Undersized drainage causing floods, contractor accountability complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Drainage design should account for heavy rainfall patterns. Residents can report recurring flooding to the drainage department for assessment.

input_text: 公司裁员只裁合约工。永久员工不管多差都不会被裁。这公平吗？
reason: Layoffs targeting contract workers while protecting permanent staff regardless of performance.
suggested_rewrite: 裁员决定应基于合理标准而非雇佣类型。受影响的合约工可向劳工部咨询权利。

input_text: Jiran buat extension rumah langgar sempadan tanah aku. Report kat PBT pun takde tindakan. Kronisme agaknya.
reason: Neighbor's house extension encroaching on property boundary, PBT inaction suspected cronyism.
suggested_rewrite: Pencerobohan sempadan tanah boleh ditangani melalui pengukur tanah berlesen dan tindakan undang-undang jika perlu. Dokumentasikan semua bukti.

input_text: The new highway interchange design is so confusing. GPS also cannot navigate properly. Multiple accidents already.
reason: Confusing highway interchange causing accidents, design flaw complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Highway interchange design should be tested with user feedback before completion. Report confusing sections to the highway operator for better signage.

input_text: மாணவர்களுக்கு போதுமான கணினி வசதிகள் இல்லை. டிஜிட்டல் கல்வி என்பது பணக்காரர்களுக்கு மட்டுமே.
reason: Digital education gap affecting students without computer access, class divide.
suggested_rewrite: டிஜிட்டல் கல்வி அனைத்து மாணவர்களுக்கும் சமாக அணுகக்கூடியதாக இருக்க வேண்டும். அரசாங்கம் கணினி மற்றும் இணைய வசதிகளை வழங்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Dah la gaji ciput, boss suruh pakai uniform sendiri. Uniform mahal gila. Lepas tu potong dari gaji.
reason: Employer deducting expensive uniform costs from already low wages.
suggested_rewrite: Potongan gaji untuk uniform mesti mematuhi Akta Kerja. Jika potongan tidak munasabah, laporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: Why do Malaysian malls have so many empty lots but still charge premium rent? No wonder small businesses die fast.
reason: High mall rent causing small business closures despite vacant lots.
suggested_rewrite: Mall operators should adjust rental rates based on occupancy. Empty lots benefit no one - flexible rent models could help both malls and tenants thrive.

input_text: 每次搭LRT都被挤成沙丁鱼。政府说要鼓励公共交通，但连基本的舒适都保证不了。
reason: LRT sardine-level overcrowding undermining public transport advocacy.
suggested_rewrite: LRT拥挤问题需要增加列车频率和车厢数量来解决。这对鼓励公共交通使用至关重要。

input_text: Kat kampung takde coverage internet langsung. Anak-anak tak boleh buat homework online. Digital divide memang real.
reason: Rural digital divide preventing children from completing online homework.
suggested_rewrite: Jurang digital antara bandar dan luar bandar perlu ditutup segera. Program peluasan jalur lebar ke kawasan pedalaman perlu dipercepatkan.

input_text: Lepas ni mesti cukai naik lagi. SST pun dah buat rakyat terbeban. Government always find new ways to tax us.
reason: Anticipating tax increases, feeling burdened by existing SST.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar percukaian perlu seimbang antara pendapatan kerajaan dan beban rakyat. Sistem percukaian progresif yang adil penting untuk pembangunan.

input_text: Doktor swasta caj RM200 untuk 10 minit consultation. Kalau specialist lagi mahal. Healthcare for the rich only.
reason: Private healthcare pricing making it exclusive to the wealthy.
suggested_rewrite: Healthcare costs should be regulated to ensure access for all. Government healthcare improvements would reduce pressure on expensive private options.

input_text: 这些快递公司把包裹随便丢在门口。被偷了他们也不负责。服务态度太差了。
reason: Delivery companies leaving parcels exposed with no accountability for theft.
suggested_rewrite: 要求快递员放在安全地点或安装包裹箱。包裹丢失可以向快递公司和消费者法庭投诉。

input_text: Sekolah kebangsaan equipment sukan pun tak cukup. Budak main bola takde bola. Macam mana nak keluarkan atlet?
reason: National school lacking basic sports equipment, athlete development concern.
suggested_rewrite: Peralatan sukan di sekolah kebangsaan perlu mencukupi. Peruntukan sukan perlu ditambah dan perbelanjaan perlu telus.

input_text: The pet shop sells sick animals and refuses refunds. So many puppies die within days of purchase. Where is the enforcement?
reason: Pet shop selling sick animals that die quickly, no consumer protection.
suggested_rewrite: Pet shops should meet veterinary health standards. Report shops selling sick animals to DVS and consider filing a consumer complaint.

input_text: Kos pengebumian pun dah naik mendadak. Tanah kubur mahal, upacara mahal. Nak mati pun kena bayar banyak.
reason: Rising funeral costs making even death expensive, dark humor about cost of living.
suggested_rewrite: Kos pengebumian yang meningkat membimbangkan. Pertubuhan agama dan komuniti boleh menawarkan pakej pengebumian mampu milik.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தின் போக்குவரத்து நெரிசல் மிகவும் மோசம். ஒவ்வொரு நாளும் மணிக்கணக்கில் போக்குவரத்தில் மாட்டிக்கொள்கிறோம்.
reason: Daily traffic congestion wasting hours of commuters' time.
suggested_rewrite: போக்குவரத்து நெரிசலை குறைக்க பொது போக்குவரத்து மற்றும் சாலை மேம்படுத்தல் தேவை.

input_text: Klinik swasta prescribe ubat mahal yang tak perlu. Sakit demam pun kena bayar RM150. Rasa macam kena exploit.
reason: Private clinic overprescribing expensive medicine for common fever, exploitation feeling.
suggested_rewrite: Pesakit berhak tanya tentang pilihan ubat dan kos. Dapatkan pendapat kedua jika rasa rawatan terlalu mahal untuk penyakit biasa.

input_text: No sidewalks at all in this housing area. Pedestrians have to share road with cars. Urban planning fail.
reason: Absence of sidewalks in residential area endangering pedestrians, planning failure.
suggested_rewrite: Pedestrian sidewalks are a basic safety requirement in residential areas. Request their installation through your local councilor's office.

input_text: 为什么这个住宅区的消防栓都是坏的？万一发生火灾怎么办？
reason: Non-functional fire hydrants in residential area, fire safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: 消防栓故障是严重的安全隐患。立即向消防部门和地方政府报告以要求维修。

input_text: Hari ni birthday aku. Tapi kena kerja 12 jam tanpa OT sebab company cakap 'salaried staff'. Hidup pekerja Malaysia memang macam ni.
reason: Working 12 hours without overtime on birthday, resigned acceptance of exploitation.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja bergaji tetap masih ada had waktu kerja di bawah Akta Kerja. Jika diminta bekerja berlebihan secara konsisten, dapatkan nasihat undang-undang.

input_text: Recycling bins in condo all mixed together. What's the point of sorting at home if it all goes into one truck?
reason: Recycling bins mixed together defeating purpose of household sorting.
suggested_rewrite: Proper recycling requires separate collection. Ask your condo management to coordinate with licensed recyclers who collect sorted materials separately.

input_text: 这些油站的厕所脏得无法使用。收过路费的高速公路连厕所都管不好。
reason: Highway petrol station toilets disgustingly dirty, concession accountability.
suggested_rewrite: 高速公路加油站的厕所卫生是服务质量的基本要求。通过高速公路运营商的投诉渠道反映问题。

input_text: Kursus kemahiran yang ditawarkan kerajaan tu outdated sangat. Belajar benda yang takde demand kat pasaran.
reason: Government skills courses teaching outdated skills with no market demand.
suggested_rewrite: Program latihan kemahiran kerajaan perlu diselaraskan dengan keperluan industri semasa. Kerjasama dengan sektor swasta boleh memastikan kursus yang relevan.

input_text: School canteen price go up but portion become smaller. Kids come home hungry. Canteen operator squeezing parents dry.
reason: School canteen shrinkflation affecting children's nutrition, parent frustration.
suggested_rewrite: School canteen pricing and portions should be monitored. Raise concerns through the PIBG to negotiate fair pricing with the canteen operator.

input_text: Cuaca panas tapi aircond bas pun tak sejuk. Bayar tambang RM5 tapi rasa macam naik sauna bergerak.
reason: Hot bus without working AC despite paying fare, comfort complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Bas awam perlu menyelenggara sistem penyaman udara dengan baik. Aduan boleh dibuat melalui aplikasi atau talian aduan pengendali bas.

input_text: Real estate agent show me different unit from what I signed for. When I complained, they said it's 'similar'. Total scam.
reason: Real estate bait-and-switch with different unit from signed agreement.
suggested_rewrite: If the unit differs from what was agreed in writing, you have grounds for a complaint. Consult the Board of Valuers, Estate Agents and Property Managers.

input_text: Kerja kat restaurant ni gaji bawah minimum wage. Boss cakap 'tips tu kira sekali'. Haram betul.
reason: Restaurant paying below minimum wage claiming tips count toward salary.
suggested_rewrite: Gaji minimum tidak boleh dikira bersama tips. Ini melanggar Akta Kerja. Laporkan kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: 这个社区的路灯全部是坏的。晚上出门就像进入黑洞。安全问题谁来负责？
reason: All street lights broken in community creating dangerous darkness.
suggested_rewrite: 成片的路灯故障需要紧急维修。向地方政府提交书面投诉并抄送当地议员。

input_text: Nak parking kat hospital pun kena berebut. Yang sakit teruk pun kena pusing cari parking. Tambah parking la please.
reason: Hospital parking shortage adding stress to seriously ill patients.
suggested_rewrite: Kekurangan tempat letak kereta hospital memerlukan perancangan yang lebih baik termasuk bangunan parking tambahan atau perkhidmatan pengangkutan.

input_text: This mamak restaurant double charges by adding service tax that doesn't appear on the receipt. Sneaky accounting.
reason: Restaurant adding hidden charges not on receipt, tax fraud suspicion.
suggested_rewrite: Service charges must be clearly stated on receipts. Report undisclosed charges to KPDNHEP and request detailed billing before paying.

input_text: Anak baru 3 tahun tapi tadika dah nak ajar ABC sampai Z. Tadika sekarang macam tekanan peperiksaan. Biar budak main la.
reason: Kindergarten pushing academics on 3-year-olds instead of play-based learning.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan awal kanak-kanak harus mengutamakan pembelajaran melalui bermain. Pilih tadika yang mengamalkan pendekatan holistik sesuai dengan peringkat umur.

input_text: 这里的夜市卖的鸡肉不知道放了多久。看起来都变色了。食品安全在哪里？
reason: Night market meat freshness concern, food safety question.
suggested_rewrite: 夜市食品安全需要定期检查。如果发现可疑的食品质量问题，向卫生部门举报。

input_text: டிவி நிகழ்ச்சிகளில் எல்லாம் ஒரே மாதிரியான உள்ளடக்கம். புதுமை இல்லை. இதற்கு ஏன் கட்டணம் செலுத்த வேண்டும்?
reason: TV content repetitive and not worth the subscription fee.
suggested_rewrite: நுகர்வோர் தேர்வுகள் அதிகமாக உள்ளன. திருப்தி இல்லையென்றால் ஸ்ட்ரீமிங் சேவைகள் போன்ற மாற்று வழிகளை ஆராயலாம்.

input_text: Dah beli rumah 5 tahun tapi playground yang developer janji masih takde. Dalam brochure cantik je tapi reality zero.
reason: Developer promised playground 5 years ago still not built despite brochure showing it.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan yang dijanjikan dalam brosur pembangunan adalah sebahagian daripada perjanjian jual beli. Buat aduan di Tribunal Pembeli Rumah dengan bukti brosur.

input_text: Nobody maintains the monsoon drain near my house. Kids play near it. One day someone will fall in and drown.
reason: Unmaintained monsoon drain near homes posing drowning risk for children.
suggested_rewrite: Unmaintained monsoon drains are drowning hazards. Report to JPS and request safety fencing. Parents should keep children away from open drains.

input_text: 每天通勤花两个小时。生活就是上班堵车下班堵车。这样的生活有什么意义？
reason: Two-hour daily commute eroding quality of life, existential frustration.
suggested_rewrite: 长时间通勤影响生活质量。考虑弹性工作安排、远程办公或住得更靠近工作地点。

input_text: Contractor pasang tile rumah baru seminggu dah tercabut. Kerja kualiti murahan tapi caj premium. Menyesal pilih diorang.
reason: New tiles coming off within a week, poor quality work at premium price.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja tiling yang gagal dalam tempoh jaminan adalah tanggungjawab kontraktor. Dokumentasikan dan minta pembaikan percuma secara bertulis.

input_text: Airport taxi queue always so long but they only allow their own cabs. Why block ride-hailing? Cartel behavior.
reason: Airport taxi monopoly blocking ride-hailing services, anti-competition complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Airport transportation should offer multiple options including ride-hailing for passenger convenience. Anti-competitive practices can be reported to MyCC.

input_text: Nak transfer duit antara bank lain kena charge RM1. Zaman digital tapi masih kena caj untuk sesuatu yang sepatutnya free.
reason: Interbank transfer fees in the digital age, outdated charging complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Pindahan wang antara bank melalui DuitNow adalah percuma untuk kebanyakan transaksi. Semak pilihan percuma yang tersedia di bank anda.

input_text: Apabila hujan lebat, paras air dalam rumah naik sampai betis. Sudah setahun begini tapi tiada tindakan.
reason: Home flooding to calf level during heavy rain for a year with no action taken.
suggested_rewrite: Banjir rumah yang berulang perlu dilaporkan dengan gambar dan tarikh kepada JPS dan ADUN. Tuntut tindakan pembaikan saliran secara rasmi.

input_text: This childcare center has too many kids per caregiver. Safety ratio completely ignored. JPNIN should inspect more often.
reason: Childcare center exceeding safe child-to-caregiver ratio, inspection complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Childcare centers must maintain proper child-to-caregiver ratios. Report overcrowding concerns to JPNIN for inspection and enforcement.

input_text: 每次交电费都觉得数目不对。电表是不是有问题？TNB从来不给解释。
reason: Electricity bill discrepancy with suspected faulty meter and no explanation from TNB.
suggested_rewrite: 可以通过myTNB应用程序自行读取电表数据进行比对。如怀疑电表故障，可要求TNB进行检测。

input_text: Gaji lecturer universiti rendah sangat berbanding tanggungjawab. No wonder ramai keluar pergi swasta atau luar negara.
reason: Low university lecturer salaries causing brain drain to private sector or abroad.
suggested_rewrite: Gaji dan kebajikan pensyarah universiti perlu ditingkatkan untuk mengekalkan bakat akademik. Ini penting untuk kualiti pendidikan tinggi negara.

input_text: Surau company suruh pakai tempat store room yang sempit. Macam tak respect pekerja Muslim nak solat.
reason: Company prayer room in cramped storeroom, feeling disrespected as Muslim employee.
suggested_rewrite: Majikan perlu menyediakan ruang solat yang bersesuaian untuk pekerja Muslim. Perbincangan dengan HR boleh membantu mendapatkan ruang yang lebih selesa.
